meaning: n.(居住在北美的印第安)海达族人[语]
examples: Guujaaw is a leader of the Haida Nation, whose people have lived on the Queen Charlotte Islands, Canada, for more than 10, 000 years.
We hope that the Haida can become partners and customers first choice.
Haida Stationery Co., Ltd. Main (production) tape cutter, tape dispenser.
By the late 1800s, European-borne diseases such as small pox had decimated the Haida population to triple figures.
It's a shaman, carved by craftsmen of the Haida tribe, from the Queen Charlotte Islands just south of Alaska.
